title: PokeXplore Cobblemon
description: Official Modpack for the PokeXplore Cobblemon server
body:
### About this modpack This pack aims to provide an immersive Cobblemon experience. As such the mods in this pack were selected keep new mechanics (besides Cobblemon) to a minimum and are meant to enhance your journey of "Gotta catch 'em all!" with certain visual changes as well as some quality of life additions and various new building blocks for a better creative outlet while taking a break from catching new Pokemon. This modpack comes with Complimentary Reimagined Shaders preinstalled although shaders are disabled by default. If you want to play with Shaders you'll have to enable them under Options → Video Settings → Shaders. Join the PokeXplore Cobblemon server through the multiplayer section to play along with others!
#### Technical Details It is recommended that you allocate at least 4GB of memory to run this instance. If you run into any issues with this modpack head over to our [discord](https://discord.gg/DjEaNjpkFZ) and let us know so we can fix these issues or help you troubleshoot.
### Mod list
